target: (I was lying on the floor the whole time, after all. I let her have the bed...)
(Ushio is sleeping in my bed in her swimsuit.)
(I was looking at the situation too objectively, and ended up not sleeping a wink...)
(How can she sleep so normally... After saying something like that last night.)
("Got a problem with me taking the side of the person I love!!" ...huh...)
(Saying she loves me... I-Is she serious...?)
(The human Ushio never said anything like that to me, not even once!?)
(But... if she's a perfect replica of a human, and even her feelings were copied... then Ushio really does... me...)
Ah... We have some bread, so I'll toast it and bring the leftover curry too.
Bread should be easier to eat, even with just one hand...

Wait a second.
Don't leave the room.
(First, breakfast... I've more or less decided what to do after that. Is there anything else I need to do...)
Morning, Shin-chan. You're up early... What's wrong?
I-I'm already awake, so... Y-You don't need to come to my room to wake me up!!
(On the morning of the first loop, at 7:30, Mio came to wake me up.)
(If I don't tell her clearly, she might come into my room again.)
The necklace Sis was wearing at the very end.
(I see, so the one she's wearing right now is a copy...)
I thought Sis would be happier if you had it, Shin-chan...
Yeah... this one is the real deal.
Does looking at it make you remember anything?
(Making her try to remember when she died... Honestly, I know I'm saying something awful.)
(But if Ushio's memories return... we should be able to get some sort of clue about the Shadows.)
The day after you gave me this seashell... Shinpei, you wet the bed!
Th-That's something you didn't need to remember. Is there anything else?
I see... Well, just try to keep it in mind and think about it.
I'm heading out. Just leave the dishes there when you're done eating.
They're opening the restaurant again starting today. So I'm going to help out.
I see... That's so like Dad... I want to see him...
(I want to let her see him, but...)
I'll be back by 2... I don't think anyone will come here, but wait quietly, okay?
